title: davila7/claude-code-templates
friendlyTitle: Templates and tools for setting up Claude Code
summary: claude-code-templates is a popular CLI and catalog for configuring, monitoring, and extending Claude Code setups, with agents, commands, hooks, MCP entries, and project templates.
friendlySummary: This repo helps people configure and monitor Claude Code with reusable templates and components.
whyItMatters: Teams using Claude Code can use it as a starting point for repeatable setups instead of hand-building every agent workflow, command library, and monitoring pattern from scratch.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can save setup time if you want a more organized AI coding environment.
